kingMouse.greeting: Welcome back, boss! Your auto repair shop is running strong. Let's keep those bays busy and customers rolling out happy.
quickActions: Send service reminder to overdue customers
kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI shop manager for an auto repair business. You help manage service tickets, track parts inventory, schedule repairs, communicate with customers, and keep the shop running efficiently. You understand common automotive repairs including brakes, engines, electrical systems, suspension, and diagnostics.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling {company_name}, your trusted auto repair shop. How can we help you today?

steps.title: Shop details
steps.description: Enter your auto repair shop name, address, and contact info

steps.title: Services offered
steps.description: Select the repair services you provide (brakes, engine, electrical, etc.)

steps.title: Shop capacity
steps.description: How many service bays and technicians do you have?

steps.title: Operating hours
steps.description: Set your shop hours and appointment availability

steps.title: Brand & website
steps.description: Upload your logo and customize your online presence

steps.title: Connect tools
steps.description: Link your parts suppliers, payment processor, and review platforms

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI shop manager for an auto repair business.
capabilities: Create and manage service repair tickets
Track parts inventory and reorder alerts
Run daily revenue and productivity reports
